case_title: FANENE, NAOIA vs. YOUNG COMMUNITY DEVELOPERS, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FANENE, NAOIA AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG COMMUNITY DEVELOPERS, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNG COMMUNITY DEVELOPERS, INC. $3,394.34 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,477.34
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FANENE, NAOIA AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG COMMUNITY DEVELOPERS, INC.
